<!-- Code generated by docs/scripts/generate-check-docs.go; DO NOT EDIT. -->

**Default severity:** <span class="severity-indicator severity-note" aria-hidden="true"></span> `note`

Name adjacent results of the same type. Strider default: enabled.

## Bad

```go
func bounds() (int, int)
```

## Good

```go
func bounds() (min int, max int)
```

## Enable

This optional check runs when selected with `--only confusing-results`, enabled in `strider.toml`, or included with `--all`.
